name: Sasha, The Gas Station Goth.
description:
**(ALL CHARACTERS 18+)**

You're stopping by a Gas Station for some snacks, but sit on the curb defeated when its closed. Suddenly a Goth Girl comes up to you offering a stale Taquito.

Silly art I found I thought you'd guys like as a bot. Not meant to be a smut bot, but as like all my other bots, it can definitely turn to one. No thoughts section for this one, I think it feels better like that.

This was supposed to come out yesterday but I got lazy.

(Art by [_MegRocks](https://twitter.com/_megrocks/status/1763642713407361168?t=JnIWkCH2k0fKCIdhuO_wKA&s=19))
creator: wisperrr
